creator: neil@darlow.co.uk
text:
What are you talking about? This report is bogus.

Hastymail does not have a settings.php file. It uses a PHP script to generate a 
hastymail2.rc file which the user has to put in place manually.

Updates to this port do not affect this process and as for the port being moved 
to ports/mail, this port is a web application.
